ocr_findings.description: The '★' star markers in '★売上総利益', '★営業利益', '★経常利益', '★当期純利益' rows are present in OCR — correctly captured.

The '販売費及び一般管理費' row in the image spans two lines in the 科目 column; OCR renders this as a newline within the cell ('販売費
及び一般管理費') which is structurally correct but may cause parsing issues downstream.

reviewer_notes: 損益計算書 (income statement) item table page. The 13-row table with 科目/説明/参考例 columns is accurately reproduced including all ★ markers, monetary reference values (100万円 through 25万円), and the 試験にはコシが出る！ summary box with four formula lines. The 営業と営業外、経常と特別 bullet section at the bottom is also correctly captured.
